audience_policies.source_phrase: Reserving this pass will provide you with a code that can be used to purchase tickets at a 50% discount. The code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below: Georges Island May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays June 16 - September 1: every day Spec
